reason: Locked requirements + 5 decisions (Q1-Q5) + implementation plan. The contract sub-agents implement against.

Full BabelDOC 0.6.2 API surface: async_translate / do_translate_async_stream / TranslateResult, 13-stage pipeline names, AGPL implications, ProcessPoolExecutor + spawn-method requirement, mono+dual config knobs, model asset paths.
WS-over-loopback transport pattern; dev-mode FastAPI + Vite tab vs Phase 3 Electron + SIDECAR_READY. Reader code runs in dev-mode browser tab for Phase 2.
Phase 1 architecture context: layered diagram, LLMGateway design, why translation subsystem isolation is a hard contract (D4 query-isolation discipline extends to translation).
Hard Rules quick-reference (AGPL SPDX / Pydantic _Strict / camelCase-state vs snake-frontmatter / atomic writes / Planner Protocol). Translation worker must respect all of these.
Subprocess isolation pattern (BabelDOC follows the same MineruConverter recipe) + auto-inject metadata + lazy heavy-import pattern (babeldoc + onnxruntime are heavy).
Subprocess crash isolation (extends to ProcessPoolExecutor for BabelDOC) + JSON-mode fallback (if any structured-output is needed in translation flow).
Workspace 9-dir layout + accessor discipline. Phase 2 adds translations/ as a 10th dir — needs to be added to WORKSPACE_LAYOUT, with a Workspace.translations_dir accessor.
Two-stream model (wiki/log.md for synthesis ops vs conversation-log.jsonl for events). Translation appends to log.md with op='translate' (it's a synthesis op like ingest/crystallize).
Still mostly stub from 00-bootstrap-guidelines, but provides the slot for reader-related conventions to land if any new patterns emerge in Phase 2B.
Reference implementation of the ProcessPoolExecutor + Planner Protocol pattern, and how LLMGateway-style config is threaded into a worker. The translation worker should mirror this pattern.
Reference for subprocess wrapper + progress callback streaming (BabelDOC adapter follows the same shape).
Shared --header / --user-agent / --max-tokens / --env-override / --planner-method flag helpers. xreadagent translate must inherit the same set via add_llm_runtime_flags.
Atomic write triad. translations/manifest.json must use it.
WikiLog + WikiConversationLog. Translation appends to both (log.md for synthesis op summary, conversation-log.jsonl for per-stage event audit).
